creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
(In reply to Lars Engels from comment #6)

> Do we have any sound support in chromium when PA is removed?

Yes, same as www/firefox the www/chromium has TWO possible AUDIO backends, ALSA and pulseaudio, sound works ok with ALSA, pulseaudio is not needed.

I also filled a BUG for www/firefox that also 'suddenly' has pulseaudio enabled by default: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=216383
